judgment.summary: TSM combines high-margin profitability and rapid growth with a strong cash position and attractive forward valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 3.49 beat the 3.33 estimate, with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-07-16.
positives: Forward P/E 20.29 vs trailing 33.99 — indicates attractive valuation relative to future earnings.
Earnings growth 58.4% and revenue growth 35.1% — shows robust top and bottom-line expansion.
Profit margin 46.5% and operating margin 58.1% — reflects industry-leading profitability.
Price/Sales (TTM) 0.50 — suggests a low valuation relative to revenue.
Free cash flow (TTM) $719.16B — demonstrates massive cash generation capabilities.
negatives: Price/Book 87.63 — represents a very high premium relative to book value.
Beta 1.26 — implies higher price volatility compared to the market.
Dividend yield 0.9% — provides minimal income generation.

news.paragraph: TSM is currently highlighted as a top investment for billionaires and a key component of AI-driven growth, though a broader chip stock selloff is underway. Traders should weigh this positive long-term sentiment against the presence of large semiconductor puts held by certain funds. The upcoming Nvidia earnings report serves as a major indirect catalyst that could trigger significant price movement.
